# Algoguido Technologies Private Limited

Algoguido Technologies Private Limited is an enterprise-grade, AI-first technology company specializing in artificial intelligence solutions, custom software engineering, cloud architecture, and professional education collaborations.

## Organization Metadata
- **Entity Name:** Algoguido Technologies Private Limited
- **Alternative Name:** Algoguido Technologies
- **Headquarters:** Guwahati, Assam, India
- **Email:** info@algoguido.com
- **Website:** https://algoguido.com
- **Jurisdiction:** Guwahati, Assam, India (Guwahati Court Jurisdiction)

## Enterprise Solutions
- **ERP Platforms:** Integrated enterprise databases, inventory control, and digital workflows.
- **CRM & Growth Systems:** Lead pipelines, sales automation, and growth analytics.
- **AI Automation & Agents:** Custom Large Language Model (LLM) agents, Natural Language Processing (NLP), and RAG integrations.
- **Cloud & Infrastructure:** Containerized microservices, high availability deployments, and database clusters.

## Proprietary Products
- **eduAI365 ERP:** AI-powered educational resource planning and management suite.
- **Apply4Jobs:** Machine learning candidate matching, resume intelligence, and hiring dashboard.
- **LeadGrowAI:** AI-driven sales funnel acceleration, automated customer relations and insights.
- **TheHirings (TheHireAMe):** AI-driven developer staffing and talent sourcing.
- **AI Workforce for Business:** Multi-agent leads management platform powered by 6 collaborating AI agents handling the lifecycle from discovery to deal closed and report analysis.

## Education & Internships
- **Paid Industry Internships:** Fee-based remote programs (from ₹3,000) for student developers with daily code reviews, production environments, and certificates.
- **Professional Training:** Specialized certifications in AI, Data Science, and Full-Stack development.
- **Academic Research:** ML, data modeling, and neural network research collaborations.

## Technology Stack
- **Languages:** TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, SQL
- **Frameworks:** React 19, Next.js 15, TailwindCSS
- **AI/ML:** PyTorch, OpenAI APIs, LangChain, Vector Databases
- **Database & Cache:** PostgreSQL, Redis
